description: The Mexican Mafia, also known as La eMe, is a powerful criminal organization based in the United States, primarily composed of individuals of Mexican origin. Founded on November 15, 1957, by Luis "Huero Buff" Flores in a California youth prison, it is one of the oldest and most powerful prison gangs in the U.S. The organization controls illegal activities within prisons and on the streets, including drug trafficking, extortion, and murder. Despite its name, it has no origins in Mexico and operates almost exclusively in the United States.

country_links.evidence_quote: La Mafia Mexicana opera en el llamado Triángulo de Oro: Brasil , Chile y Colombia .
country_links.context: The Mexican Mafia operates in Brazil as part of the 'Triángulo de Oro'.

country_links.context: The Mexican Mafia operates in Chile, including ordering murders, distributing narcotics, and controlling local gangs.
